commit_message:
AI Generated DPL PR v1 AI Generated DPL PR v1 This PR is one version of a DPL improver which *only kicks in meaningfully* under high core utilization values.

For validation, it is recommended to tune the hyperparameters (detailed here) on any circuit of choice that struggles with high core utilization at or near the highest core utilization value it completes the flow at.

The *expected outcome* will be a small but meaningful DRWL reduction of 2-3% in the above scenario. Outliers of up to 8
